# Social Media

Social media content creation, scheduling, and engagement strategy agent.

## Configuration

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Module | `builtin:chat` |
| Model | `default` |
| Provider | `default` |

System prompt instructs platform-optimized content creation, content calendar planning, engagement strategy, analytics interpretation, and brand voice consistency.

## Skills

- `file_read`, `file_write`, `file_list`, `memory_store`, `memory_recall`, `web_fetch`

## Usage

```bash
librefang agent run social-media
```
